description: Official skill for integrating Firebase AI Logic (Gemini API) into web applications. Covers setup, multimodal inference, structured output, and security.
representativeQueries: How do I set up Firebase AI Logic in my web app?
Can Gemini analyze images and videos directly?
What's the difference between Gemini Developer API and Vertex AI?
How do I enable structured output with Firebase AI Logic?
Show me how to integrate multimodal AI into my application
